schema_rows.binding_rule: 1 when bounded catalyst context resolves to single_pulse for the matched lane or lane-outcome bucket.
1 when bounded catalyst context resolves to multi_day_reinforcement for the matched lane or lane-outcome bucket.
1 when bounded catalyst context resolves to policy_followthrough for the matched lane or lane-outcome bucket.
0 for core_confirmed rows, 1 for market_confirmed_indirect rows, higher values remain undefined in the bounded pilot.

interpretation: V1.4 now has explicit report-only context features instead of only protocol-level intentions.
The schema keeps catalyst and concept context separated but consumable under auditable binding rules.
The next legal step is a bounded discrimination check, not model work or strategy integration.
